description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A contract packaging machine builder is preparing to ship a new rotary filler to Monterrey, Mexico. As the controls engineer, configure the project to support dual-language (English as Language 1 and Spanish as Language 2). Using the 'oem_translation_matrix.csv' reference document located on the Desktop in the CrimsonTasks folder, create the 5 data tags from the matrix with their corresponding Data and Format types. Configure the tags with the English and Spanish translations provided in the matrix, ensuring French translations are not used. Create a display page containing these 5 tags and a control to toggle the HMI language. Save the project as 'packaging_hmi_mexico.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
